ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region or state where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., T2M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which temperature data is available */,
  "start_month" TEXT /* Start month of the year */,
  "end_month" TEXT /* End month of the year */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a leap year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the station is situated */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the research institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data contribution */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution contributing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter measured */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the data is available */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was contributed */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the contributed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES research_institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
